content_body: Dear Owners, thank you for letting us stay in your cabin for Thanksgiving 2018. This cabin has everything you need and more! A few things about Blue Ridge: 1) Ingles is AWESOME! 2) The Swinging Bridge is very cool, 3) The town of Blue Ridge is way better than McCaysville (for now), but everyone is super nice everywhere! Happy 17th birthday to Jacob while we were here. Thank you!
title: Everything and More!
